response.justification: Candidate has 10+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, which aligns with the role's MCP and agentic workflow focus. However, the resume lacks demonstrated depth in production GenAI systems, RAG architectures, vector databases, multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph/CrewAI), or major cloud platforms beyond AWS CDK at Optilyz. No Python experience is listed, and there is no evidence of customer-facing technical leadership at the staff level required for a Forward Deployed role.
strengths: Recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
10+ years of polyglot engineering across TypeScript/Node.js, with strong testing and craftsmanship discipline
Proven track record of teaching, workshops, and mentoring (Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos, talks)
concerns: No Python experience listed; GenAI role typically expects Python fluency
No demonstrated experience with RAG, vector databases, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI
Limited evidence of customer-facing forward-deployed work or major cloud platform breadth (GCP/Azure)

key_factors.factor: Missing Python and GenAI stack depth
Recent MCP and agentic workflow experience
